name: ps-claude-skills
description: Peter Stanchev's Claude Code skills: relentless plan-grilling, multi-agent OWASP & performance audits, mutation-verified test authoring, plus reference standards for ML evaluation and FastAPI structure.

plugins.name: ps-skills
plugins.description: Six skills: grill-me (interrogate a plan), owasp-audit & perf-audit (multi-agent audits), test-author-skeptic (mutation-verified tests), ml-eval (evaluation metrics), fastapi-skeleton (FastAPI structure).
